title: Legacy Hide And Seek
description: A configurable and fully localized hide-and-seek minigame plugin for Paper servers.
body:
**HideAndSeek** is a custom mini-game plugin designed for Paper servers (Minecraft 1.21.5+), where one player is manually chosen as the seeker and the others hide. The game includes a countdown timer, player tracking, and automatic resets when the game ends.

🎮 **Key Features:**
- Requires 2+ players to start a game
- Manual seeker assignment via `/setseeker <name>`
- Configurable zones:
  - `/setstartzone <x> <y> <z>`
  - `/setseekerzone <x> <y> <z>`
  - `/setlobbyzone <x> <y> <z>`
- Set game duration in minutes using `/setgametime <minutes>`
- Starts with `/startgame` and ends with `/stopgame`
- Players are automatically teleported and given:
  - 64 golden carrots
  - 64 fireworks
  - Unbreaking III elytra (in inventory)
- The seeker also receives a Netherite sword with Sharpness V and glowing effect
- PvP is enabled during the game (including between hiders)
- Experience bar displays time left
- ActionBar kill messages: *Player A killed Player B*
- Language switching: `/lang <en|ru>` (global setting for all players)
- Supports clean restart-safe game session handling
- Items and effects cleared on game end
- Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.5 and 1.21.6
- Only OPs can run commands

🗂 **Commands:**
- `/startgame`
- `/stopgame`
- `/setstartzone <x> <y> <z>`
- `/setseekerzone <x> <y> <z>`
- `/setlobbyzone <x> <y> <z>`
- `/setgametime <minutes>`
- `/setseeker <player>`
- `/lang <en|ru>`

📝 **Configurable via `config.yml`**
- All zones and game parameters are stored in `plugins/HideAndSeek/config.yml`

🌐 **Languages:**
- English (default)
- Russian

📌 **Permission:**
- Commands are only available to server operators (OP)
